nodes.name: Herbert Friedmann
nodes.summary: Herbert Friedmann (April 22, 1900 – May 14, 1987) was an American ornithologist.

nodes.name: 阿鲁沙
nodes.summary: 阿鲁沙是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括暗色歌百灵，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 暗色歌百灵
nodes.summary: 暗色歌百灵（Friedmann's lark，学名 Mirafra pulpa），已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 东察沃国家公园
nodes.summary: 东察沃国家公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括暗色歌百灵、Sentinel lark，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Friedmann's lark (Mirafra pulpa) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in East Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Friedmann's lark is found in southern Ethiopia, central and south-eastern Kenya, and north-eastern Tanzania, but its population and exact range are very poorly known. The type specimen was collected in Ethiopia (from the Konso-Sagan area) in 1992, having been seen only one time since, in 1998; but most of what is known comes primarily from data collected in Tsavo East and West National Parks, in Kenya. There are also a few records from Tanzania, from Mkomazi Game Reserve, south of Arusha. In general, the natural habitats of Friedmann's lark are subtropical or tropical dry lowland grasslands. Being aloof and shy, it apparently chooses the moister (or less dry), ranker-growing of these areas, and where it can find it, those with more bush-cover
